summary: Backend audit of Blueprint Flow (37/44 pytest passed, 84%). Auth/projects/floors/categories/tasks/upload/approve flows all work for admin+designer+onsite. CRITICAL RBAC defects found.

critical.issue: DESIGNER role can list ALL users (returns 200). Should be ADMIN-only per spec/UI.
On-site reviewer CAN still download a REJECTED previous-version file (200). lib/access.ts hiding rule is NOT enforced server-side. RBAC bypass.
Onsite reviewer sees ASSIGNED tasks (not yet PENDING_REVIEW). Spec says they should only see PENDING_REVIEW / REVISION_SUBMITTED for their specialization.
No route exists - returns 404 HTML. Admin/Settings 'rename/delete specialization' feature is NOT implemented in backend.
Response omits specializationId for onsite user (null) even though user has one assigned in DB. Breaks client-side specialization filtering.

minor.issue: Returns 405 instead of 4xx. Password-change endpoint shape unclear - no dedicated /api/profile/password route discovered.
Reject requires field 'reason' (not 'comment'). Document the field name; ensure FE sends reason.

action_items: FIX RBAC: GET /api/users must require ADMIN role (currently any auth user passes).
FIX RBAC bypass: GET /api/files/{id} must apply lib/access.ts visibility for ONSITE - currently REJECTED prior versions are downloadable.
FIX onsite task list: filter to PENDING_REVIEW/REVISION_SUBMITTED + matching specialization; ASSIGNED tasks must be hidden.
Implement PATCH+DELETE handlers in /app/app/api/specializations/[id]/route.ts (route file missing entirely).
Include specializationId in /api/auth/me response for ONSITE users.
Provide /api/profile/password (POST) with 400/401 on wrong current password; current /api/profile rejects POST with 405.
critical_code_review_comments: Missing /app/app/api/specializations/[id]/route.ts - no edit/delete handlers although UI promises Settings CRUD.
lib/access.ts visibility rules apparently only consulted by task-file list, not by direct /api/files/[id] GET handler - centralize the check.
Reject API uses field 'reason'; UI label is 'comment' - align naming to avoid bugs.
/api/auth/me serializer drops specializationId for ONSITE; check select clause.
test_credentials: admin manish.uppal@blueprintflow.in / designer amarpreet.padam@blueprintflow.in / onsite sudama@blueprintflow.in - all password123
seed_data_creation: Created TEST project + 4 floors + 2 design categories + 1 task + 2 file versions via API as part of pytest run. Not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend Playwright UI testing was NOT performed due to time/token budget. Backend pytest covers full admin->designer->onsite happy path including file upload+review. Re-run after RBAC fixes; specifically verify (1) designer GET /api/users => 403, (2) onsite GET /api/files/<rejected-file-id> => 403/404, (3) onsite GET /api/tasks excludes ASSIGNED, (4) PATCH/DELETE /api/specializations/[id] works, (5) /api/auth/me returns specializationId for onsite. Use existing test file /app/backend/tests/test_blueprint_flow.py.
rca of the issue: RBAC checks are inconsistently applied: /api/users route only calls requireUser() not requireRole('ADMIN'); /api/files/[id] does not invoke lib/access.ts visibility filter; task list filter for ONSITE does not constrain by status. Specialization [id] route file does not exist. /api/auth/me select likely omits specializationId column.
